'''鈭歾h-p-dh-y''' ('''kazhapdheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaff|yaff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaff|yaff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-p-dh-y
|-
! Lemma
| kazhapdheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhapdheyoko|thizhapdheyoko]] || [[word:jizhapdheyoko|jizhapdheyoko]] || [[word:shizhapdheyoko|shizhapdheyoko]] || [[word:kizhapdheyoko|kizhapdheyoko]]
